## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review recent articles, and align on next steps for Tavrn's content production.](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on factual, informative legal content; avoid opinion pieces or extreme language](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Two articles approved for publication: Brock Services lawsuit and How to Maximize Personal Injury Policies](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Aida out next week; Andi (head of customer ops) to cover](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Recommendations for improving AI visibility: set up G2 and Trust Radius profiles, consider Reddit presence](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Strategy

  - [Brock Services lawsuit article approved with minor edits:](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
      - [Remove extreme language (e.g., "obliterated", "spectacularly")](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Cut "defense missteps" section (too opinionated)](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Keep fact-based descriptions and compelling narratives](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Preference for informative legal content over AI/tech implementation advice](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Approved topics: policy limits per state, medical record retrieval costs, fault vs. no-fault insurance, settlement averages, damage caps by state](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Hold off on publishing "Law firms using AI" article; focus on building a portfolio of informative pieces first](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Jessica to take over most of Aida's weekly editing](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Aida to send Jessica minimally edited outputs for final polish](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Kelly to run point on article approvals](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

### AI Visibility Recommendations

  - [Current Tavrn AI visibility: low compared to competitors (based on Scrunch data)](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Quick wins:](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
    1.  Set up profiles on G2 and Trust Radius (high authority sites frequently referenced by LLMs)
    2.  Consider building presence on Reddit (high clout with LLMs)
  - [Example: Made-up car experiment showed Reddit and website as top LLM references within a day](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

### Access and Permissions

  - [GrowthX team given editing access to Tavrn's content folder](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Request for GA4 and Google Search Console access (team@uxlabs email)](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Kelly to be added to all recurring meetings moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Address comments and publish Brock Services lawsuit article](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Create additional blog posts based on approved topics for next week](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Hold "Law firms using AI" article for future use](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Set up G2 and Trust Radius profiles for Tavrn](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Provide GA4 and GSC access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Add Kelly to all recurring meetings](https://fathom.video/share/jRpgRT7Ecg2czuFhhxFxLc4ZRa89JHsd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
